records.title: Richard Nguyen, Caleb Groen, Andy Briseño
records.overview: Andy Briseño, a novelist & associate professor from Natchitoches, Louisiana; Caleb Groen, a law & policy student originally from Thousand Oaks, California; Richard Nguyen, a research attorney from Placentia, California (whose 2-day cash winnings total $36,801).

records.title: Richard Nguyen, Robyn Masella, Ben Crockett
records.overview: Ben Crockett, a director of data analytics originally from Laurel, Washington; Robyn Masella, a victim advocate from Corvallis, Oregon; Richard Nguyen, a research attorney from Placentia, California (whose 1-day cash winnings total $20,801).

records.title: Adam Remsen, Richard Nguyen, Mandy Moreno
records.overview: Mandy Moreno, a social psychologist from Brooklyn, New York; Richard Nguyen, a research attorney from Placentia, California; Adam Remsen, an attorney & theater producer from Memphis, Tennessee (whose 12-day cash winnings total $306,415).
